description_long: This is a single-story suburban house surrounded by a variety of mature trees and landscaping. The house features a prominent gable roof with gray shingles and a central entryway accessible by a short walkway. The exterior walls are light-colored, possibly stucco or siding, with dark trim around the windows and base. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, providing ample natural light. The property includes a driveway and a small front lawn, with the house set back from the street. The landscaping includes both leafy deciduous trees and palm-like plants, creating a lush, inviting appearance.
description: A single-story suburban house with a gable roof, light exterior, symmetrical windows, and lush landscaping with mature trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the house partially obscured by trees, with the driveway and walkway leading to the central entryway.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the driveway, side lawn, and the house's roofline, with trees framing the property.
description_view_2: Direct front view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical windows, front lawn, and the full extent of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back and side of the house, more trees, and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a short walkway, single front door, small steps, and no prominent porch or columns.
